_comment: Shared D-Bus contract for gatepath-netns-helper. Single source of truth for the wire interface between the Rust helper (desktop/gatepath-netns-helper/src/dbus_service.rs) and the Python client (desktop/gatepath/netns_client.py). Both sides are drift-guarded against THIS file in CI (.github/workflows/dbus-contract-parity.yml), mirroring docs/audit_log_schema.json + schema-parity.yml. D-Bus type codes: s=string, u=uint32, i=int32, ''=no value. Method args exclude the &self receiver and zbus header/signal-emitter parameters. Error NAMES are guarded separately by desktop/tests/test_netns_client.py; only the prefix is pinned here.

SetupCaptive.doc: interface_name -> netns path; errors on refusal

TeardownCaptive.doc: tear down the active session; errors on refusal

LaunchPortal.doc: portal_url, wayland_display, x_display, x_authority -> spawned PID (DESK-004 display args)

PortalSubprocessExited.doc: pid, exit_code (-1 if signalled), signal_num (0 if exited normally)
